data.narrative:
Parry Labs is a Series B-stage frontier-tech company in Defense & Security that has raised $80M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comparable universe of 10 companies: 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers in the same sector and stage, including Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using the $80M total raised as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.9x multiplier typical of Series B step-ups, yields an implied valuation of $152M. Peer-median analysis across 6 same-stage, same-sector comparables produced a median valuation of $1.2B, with a range spanning $1.0B to $1.5B. The peer set includes Vannevar Labs and Dream Security at $1.5B, Harmattan AI at $1.4B, and both Castelion and Defense Unicorns at $1.0B.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $129M to $1.4B, with a median of $676M. The wide dispersion reflects material uncertainty around the weighting of stage-progression versus peer comparables. Stage-progression assumes early-stage fundraising multiples apply; peer-median assumes Parry Labs is comparable to maturer Series B firms in the defense sector. Resolution of this range would benefit from clarity on Parry Labs' revenue run-rate, customer concentration, and technology differentiation relative to named peers.
